# Capped Out Labs
> AI built into how your company runs — faster, cheaper, reusable. Production systems, not strategy decks.

## About
Capped Out Labs is an AI transformation firm that builds custom AI into how a company runs. The work gets faster and cheaper, and the system gets reused across the business. Founded by the operators behind Capped Out Media, it deploys AI sales infrastructure, operations platforms, and revenue systems for operators doing $250K+ in annual revenue.

## Services
- AI Revenue Sprint ($15K, 2 weeks) — Single workflow audit + build
- AI Revenue Infrastructure ($50K-$150K, 6-10 weeks) — 3-5 workflows across departments
- Full AI Transformation ($200K-$500K+, 3-6 months) — Complete infrastructure rebuild
- Equity/Rev-Share (No upfront cost) — 3-10% equity or 10-20% revenue share

## Key Results
- $200K to $3.9M revenue growth (+1,866%) in 45 days
- 90% CAC reduction ($11,765 to $1,217)
- 23.4x ROAS
- Show rate improvement from 26.3% to 77.9%
- 18+ hours/week saved through automation
- 200+ AI systems deployed across 30+ verticals
